items.title: Tracking Jeremy Grantham's GMO Capital Portfolio - Q4 2025 Update
Salesforce’s Agentforce AI Bet And Buybacks Reshape CRM’s Investment Case
items.description: Salesforce is pushing hard into AI with Agentforce, expanding monetization across new products and industry verticals. The company reported fourth quarter results ahead of expectations and raised its share buyback authorization to US$50b. Agentforce has reached US$800m in annual recurring revenue, more than 160% higher year over year. New AI offerings, including Slackbot assistants and Agentforce for Life Sciences, are attracting large pharmaceutical clients and competing directly with...

items.title: Consumer Tech News (Feb 23-27): US–Taiwan Trade Tensions Escalates, Amazon Invests $12B In US & More
items.description: Mark Kelly emphasized the rapid workplace impact of artificial intelligence and called for "practical rules" that protect families while preserving innovation. U.S.–Taiwan trade tensions escalated after the Supreme Court struck down former President Donald Trump's emergency tariff authority. Trump responded by criticizing Taiwan's semiconductor dominance and proposing new tariffs.
